scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build-frontend: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.build-backend: npm install --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.build: node -e "if (process.env.WEBSITE_INSTANCE_ID || process.env.ORYX_ENV_NAME) { console.log('Skipping Azure rebuild (prebuilt in CI)'); process.exit(0); }" && npm run build-frontend && npm run build-backend
